summary: Recording has a tracking error that merges Me & My Uncle and Mexicali Blues; no performance details are provided.
review: The sole reviewer notes a clear technical flaw: Track 6 combines Me & My Uncle into Mexicali Blues instead of being split, indicating a tracking problem. No comments on the band's playing or set flow are given, so the musical quality cannot be assessed from this review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Track 6 incorrectly combines Me & My Uncle and Mexicali Blues; tracks were not separated as intended.
